results.rendered_html:
mahīyas a. Greater, larger, more powerful or weighty or important, mightier, stronger (compar. of mahat q. v.).
— m. A great or nobleminded man; prakṛtiḥ khalu sā mahīyasaḥ sahane nānyasamunnatiṃ yayā  Ki. 2. 21 ;  Śi. 2. 13.
